ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or territory */,
  "hasc_code" TEXT /* HASC (Hierarchical Administrative Subdivision Codes) code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or territory */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the state or territory in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state or territory belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state data was last updated */,
  "geo_data" TEXT /* Additional geographical information, such as latitude and longitude coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Total recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Total active cases (confirmed - recovered - deaths) */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* New confirmed cases for the day */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* New deaths for the day */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* New recovered cases for the day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the COVID-19 data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the COVID-19 data was last updated */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Source of the COVID-19 data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people who have received at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people who have been fully vaccinated */,
  "daily_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered on the day */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vaccination data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vaccination data was last updated */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccine doses administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_capacity" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital capacity data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of hospital beds */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds */,
  "occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied hospital beds */,
  "occupied_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied ICU beds */,
  "availability_rate" REAL /* Availability rate of hospital beds (percentage of available beds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hospital capacity data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hospital capacity data was last updated */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., public, private, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_capacity_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "negative_tests" INTEGER /* Number of negative tests */,
  "daily_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the day */,
  "test_rate" REAL /* Testing rate (number of tests per 1000 people) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the testing data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the testing data was last updated */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test used */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the tests (e.g., positive, negative, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health authority */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the health authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the health authority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the health authority data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the health authority data was last updated */,
  "authority_type" TEXT /* Type of health authority (e.g., state, federal, etc.) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the health authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_authorities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health measure */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the public health measure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the measure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the public health measure data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the public health measure data was last updated */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of public health measure (e.g., lockdown, mask mandate, etc.) */,
  "measure_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the public health measure (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_measures_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, etc.) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user data was last updated */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, etc.) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., web interface, API, etc.) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., new data, correction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (comma-separated list of permissions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
